description_long: This object is a standard cigarette, featuring a cylindrical shape with a light brown filter at one end and a white paper-wrapped body. The filter is clearly demarcated from the rest of the cigarette by a thin gold band. The opposite end displays a packed brownish-orange tobacco tip, with some visible loose tobacco strands. The paper wrapping is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or text. There are no signs of burning, charring, or ash at the tip, indicating it is unused. The overall appearance is clean and typical of a commercially produced filtered cigarette.
description: A clean, unused cigarette with a brown filter, white paper body, and visible tobacco at the tip. No branding, burn marks, or ash are present.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cigarette, with the brown filter on the left and the tobacco tip on the right.
description_view_1: End-on view of the tobacco tip, revealing packed brownish-orange tobacco strands.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the filter on the right and the tobacco tip on the left.
description_view_3: End-on view of the filter, showing the flat, light brown filter surface.
